families.name: Engineering & Technology
families.tagline: Build the future — software, hardware, infrastructure, AI.
families.blurb: From IIT-grade computer science to civil engineering that builds metros, this family hires more graduates than any other in India. India Skills Report 2026 places CS at 80% employability — the highest of any stream.

families.name: Medical & Healthcare
families.tagline: Care, cure, research — a doctor isn't the only doctor.
families.blurb: MBBS is the famous one; nursing, physiotherapy, B.Pharm, BDS, AYUSH, public health, biomedical engineering, clinical psychology, and veterinary medicine are the eight other doors into healthcare in India.

families.name: Law & Public Policy
families.blurb: Any stream can lead here. CLAT and AILET land you in NLUs after Class 12. UPSC and NDA open civil and defence services. India is short of corporate lawyers — Tier-1 firms pay ₹15–25 LPA to fresh NLU grads.

families.name: Commerce, Finance & Business
families.blurb: Commerce graduate employability jumped from 55% to 62.81% in India Skills Report 2026, driven by BFSI and fintech. CA, CS, CMA, ACCA, CFA, IPM-IIM, investment banking — none require an engineering degree.

families.name: Design, Media & Creative
families.tagline: Make things people use, watch, wear.
families.blurb: UX designers, architects, animators, content creators. NID, NIFT, IIT-Bombay (UCEED) and CEPT (NATA) are gateways. Digital-first hiring is reshaping this family — fastest growing in India per LinkedIn 2026.

families.name: Liberal Arts & Social Sciences
families.blurb: Economics, psychology, political science, sociology, journalism. Ashoka, Krea, FLAME, Azim Premji, Symbiosis, BHU and DU (via CUET) make this a real career — not 'what's left'. Average employability has crossed 55% for Arts grads.

families.name: Vocational, Trades & Sports
families.tagline: Skilled hands, strong bodies, real income — fast.
families.blurb: ITI electrician/welder/fitter starts at ₹18–28K/month and crosses ₹1.5 lakh/month with experience. Pilot, chef, hotel management, sports coach, defence (other ranks), agripreneur, solar tech. Ready-to-work in 1–3 years.

families.name: Science & Research
families.tagline: Discover. Patent. Publish. Build the science India needs.
families.blurb: IISER, IISc, NISER, CMI, ISI, TIFR, NIPER. BS-MS dual degrees, integrated PhDs, INSPIRE-SHE scholarship of ₹80,000/year. India needs astrophysicists, climate scientists, mathematicians, statisticians — not just IIT engineers.
